@Nunyajonesinc you hit the nail on the head. This shit sucks, and you perfectly encapsulated the feeling a lot of us have…
item.dc:creator: RorytheRedKing

item.title: Chess Grandmaster Anna Muzychuk, on refusing to play in Saudi Arabia.
item.description: 'In a few days, I'll lose two world titles, one after another. Because I decided not to go to Saudi Arabia. I refuse to play by special rules, wear abaya, be accompanied by a man so I can get out of the hotel, so I don't feel like a second-class person. 'I will follow my principles and not compete in the fast chess and blitz world championship where in just 5 days I could have made more money than with dozens of other combined tournaments. This is all very unpleasant but the sad part is that no one seems to care. Bitter feelings, but I can't go back.' Anna Muzychuk (originally posted by @ltoka00 on 2021-04-06 23:08:15)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Freshly Stolen Memes- A Dump for Paul #14
item.description: Dog tax of Louie. Louie belonged to Paul (from the title!) who is dying of lung cancer. He has been given 6 months. He is in dire straits financially since he cannot work and only recently got approved for Medicade. (He is 36 and has 2 kids). He has sold his possessions of value and this fundraiser is a last resort option for him. He needs money for medical bills, rent, prescriptions, food, and eventually end of life expenses. If you are of a giving mind or have recently been possessed by a charitable ghost, he has recently set up a PayPal fundraiser here >> https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/8IwCPIC0xc (Previous fundraiser was here https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/8HFMSlCe6u) Thank you to everyone who has sent well wishes, donated, and followed us thus far, we are very grateful for every like, message, and dollar, they make a tremendous difference. Please get any weird/new lumps and bumps on yourself checked, get weird coughs checked, and get a yearly physical if you can, it might save your life. ****EDIT**** - Most viral, woo-hoo! Glad this dump is being enjoyed! Extra thanks to the 4 of you awesome folks that have donated tonight, you guys rock! $40 is roughly gas costs for the week getting to and from appointments, thank you!!❤️***Double edit - Holy crap, thank you guys! Seriously, thank you. . . Previous Dumps for Paul 1 - https://imgur.com/gallery/K0dLkFj 2- https://imgur.com/gallery/S2tHMzN 3- https://imgur.com/gallery/0vwotvp 4- https://imgur.com/gallery/63ld6W5 5 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KZM2YJk 6- https://imgur.com/gallery/pHlA2CO 7-https://imgur.com/gallery/dBm3gVd 8-https://imgur.com/gallery/43RiEnM 9-https://imgur.com/gallery/SOkxyfm 10- https://imgur.com/gallery/4IBWVn1 11-https://imgur.com/gallery/Q2WKIPi 12 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KkoK6mb 13- https://imgur.com/gallery/A3PI7ur
item.dc:creator: WILLPMYOUYOURDESIRES

item.title: My personal war
item.description:
I am a journalist of Ukrainian tv channel “Espreso” turned Territorial Defense Fighter in Kyiv region. More than eight years ago I covered events of Revolution of Dignity. Then I’ve documented russian invasion of our eastern regions and war over there. But when war criminals and occupants knocked on my door, I’ve decided to act differently.
Thanks a lot to everyone, who supports Ukrainians in these trying times.
Moment of tranquility
War isn’t just about fighting. It’s about walking a lot(ARMA III reference) and a metric shit ton of digging
On my watch
Not so much
That’s 82 mm mortar sent by “liberators”
Going on a trip
Defending a small village near Kyiv
Mua in thermal optics
Thanks a lot for your attention. Please keep supporting Ukraine. We’re still here, we’re still fighting.
item.dc:creator: EliBLifter

item.title: Most of these people are still alive... and they vote.
item.description: 1960 - Six-year-old Ruby Bridges (not pictured) went to a white school. The people in this picture thought it was acceptable to badger and harass a small child for attending school. Ruby is still alive and 67 years old today. Many of the people in this picture are also alive and they vote. We out number them, even in many "red" states, but that only matters if we vote.
item.dc:creator: GandolfFood

item.title: 41 Days
item.description: Pictures of President Zelensky on 22nd February 2022 (just prior to the invasion), and in Bucha 2 days ago. A hero with the weight of a nation on his young shoulders. Our thought, our song Will not die, will not perish… Oh there, people, is our glory, Glory of Ukraine! (Taras Shevchenko)
item.dc:creator: HilbertsHotel

item.title: American Taliban
item.description: Republicans love to bitch about Hunter while surreptitiously working to turn America into an christian fascist state. Imagine being so horrible than terrorist taliban has more progressive views than you on this issue. https://www.rawstory.com/marjorie-taylor-2657101937/ https://www.reuters.com/world/asia-pacific/taliban-release-decree-saying-women-must-consent-marriage-2021-12-03/ #republicansareterriblepeople
item.dc:creator: BaronWolfgangVonWolfhausen

item.title: Ever seen an Unheated Tanzanite?
item.description: New natural color (Unheated) Tanzanite from Tanzania. Steve Moriarty just finished faceting this 28.36ct gem for our Live Streaming Gem Show that happens tonight at 7:05PM (Chicago Time) on our YouTube channel here: https://youtu.be/6HpVnp0xBNc Stop by to see this and many other amazing rare gemstones!
item.dc:creator: MoreGems

item.description: Not me literally in the video but I did this once, as well. I was even more embarrassed
item.dc:creator: drestinblack

item.title: A pose a day: A challenger emerges
item.description: Hi! I'm AdorkaStock. I photograph myself and others in various poses for art reference. My goal is to include in my galleries of stock poses a variety of body types, skin types, and people doing various things so there is a piece of stock for everyone. I want to share my stock, which is free to use for reference, with as many people as possible in case they need it! FAQ is in my bio. Now you may be thinking... You've already shared these? But this is an example of how you can merge my stock images together to set a scene. :) These are two separate images put together (also going on my new business card)! Hope it helps you somehow! Happy drawing!
item.dc:creator: adorkastock

item.title: Fire in the EU! Guy Verhofstadt on "Mission to save Ukraine"
item.description: Guy Verhofstadt, EU plenary speech. One person in the EU council who puts together words in sentences that mean something and not just stacks them up in garbage piles. Well worth checking the whole speech (nice mic drop) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=41wft1daADg
